message.content:
Do a very thorough exploration of the src/ directory:
1. Map out all subdirectories and their purposes
2. Identify all services and their responsibilities
3. Review lib/ shared utilities
4. Check api/ routes and endpoints
5. Review workers/ for background jobs
6. Check optimizer/ for C++ integration
7. Identify key patterns used (Drizzle ORM, Zod validation, OpenTelemetry)

Give me a complete understanding of the implementation structure.

content.text: I'll conduct a thorough exploration of the src/ directory to map out the implementation structure. Let me start with a systematic scan.
Let me map the directory structure more effectively:
